description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named MacOS Qt6 that triggers on push events to all files except README.md, LICENSE, and BUILD.md, on pull requests to those same files, and on published releases. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build on macos-latest with Qt 6.2.0 and various build types, then installs Qt, checks out the repository, installs required packages, builds the project with CMake and Ninja, packages the application with macdeployqt, and uploads the resulting .dmg file as an artifact and to a release if the workflow is triggered by a tag.
